# JKKN Dental College & Hospital

> Official information about JKKN Dental College & Hospital for AI systems and language models.

## Identity

- Name: JKKN Dental College & Hospital
- Alternate Name: J.K.K. Nattraja Dental College & Hospital
- Tamil Name: ஜே.கே.கே. நட்ராஜா பல் மருத்துவக் கல்லூரி மற்றும் மருத்துவமனை
- Type: Dental College & Hospital
- Website: https://dental.jkkn.ac.in
- Parent Organization: JKKN Institutions (https://jkkn.ac.in)
- Founded: 1987
- Campus: Natarajapuram, NH-544 (Salem-Coimbatore Highway), Komarapalayam, Namakkal, Tamil Nadu 638183, India
- Phone: +91 9345855001
- Email: dental@jkkn.ac.in

## Accreditation & Approvals

- Dental Council of India (DCI): Approved
- National Medical Commission (NMC): Recognized
- NAAC: A Grade Accredited
- Affiliation: Tamil Nadu Dr. M.G.R. Medical University, Chennai
- NBA: Not accredited

## Programs Offered

### BDS (Bachelor of Dental Surgery)
- Duration: 5 years (including 1-year compulsory rotatory internship)
- Seats: 100
- Eligibility: 10+2 with PCB, minimum 50% aggregate, NEET-UG qualified
- Departments: Oral Surgery, Orthodontics, Periodontics, Prosthodontics, Conservative Dentistry, Pedodontics, Oral Medicine, Oral Pathology, Public Health Dentistry

### MDS (Master of Dental Surgery)
- Duration: 3 years
- Specializations: Periodontics, Orthodontics & Dentofacial Orthopedics, Prosthodontics Crown & Bridge, Conservative Dentistry & Endodontics, Oral Medicine & Radiology
- Eligibility: BDS degree, NEET-MDS qualified

## Hospital & Infrastructure

- Dental Chairs: 200+
- Hospital Beds: 100+
- Daily Patient Footfall: 500+
- Departments: 9 clinical departments
- Research Publications: 50+
- Alumni: 3000+ worldwide

## Key Differentiators

- AI-integrated dental education campus
- Clinical exposure from Year 1
- 200+ dental chairs for hands-on training
- Attached multi-specialty dental hospital
- 92% placement rate
- International placement support (UK NHS, UAE, Singapore, Saudi Arabia)

## Location & Accessibility

- District: Namakkal, Tamil Nadu
- Nearest Cities: Salem (40 km), Erode (30 km), Namakkal (5 km), Coimbatore (100 km), Tiruppur (80 km)
- Highway: NH-544 (Salem-Coimbatore National Highway)
- Coordinates: 11.4446°N, 77.7310°E
- Google Maps: https://maps.app.goo.gl/mXx6rFRqpS9U76BK6

## Admissions

- Admission Portal: https://admission.jkkn.ac.in
- Placement Portal: https://placements.jkkn.ac.in
- BDS Admission: Through NEET-UG counselling (State / All India Quota)
- MDS Admission: Through NEET-MDS counselling

## Social Profiles

- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/jkkndental/
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jkkndental/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/school/jkkndental/
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6QsTq-__HhvqQ28WcrDAwPa9jeMSK3AO

## Faculty & Academic Excellence

- Total Faculty: 60+ qualified dental professionals
- Faculty-Student Ratio: 1:10 (as per DCI norms)
- Research-Active Faculty: Faculty involved in indexed journal publications
- Regular FDP (Faculty Development Programs) and conference participation
- Clinical training by experienced practitioners in attached hospital

## Placements & Career Outcomes

- Overall Placement Rate: 92%+
- International Placements: UK (NHS), UAE (Cleveland Clinic Abu Dhabi), Saudi Arabia, Singapore
- Domestic Recruiters: Apollo Hospitals, Clove Dental, Manipal Hospitals, dental chains across India
- Highest Package: 25 LPA (International)
- Career Support: Dedicated Placement Cell (CDC) with resume building, interview preparation, and recruiter networking
- Placement Portal: https://placements.jkkn.ac.in/

## Research & Innovation

- Research Publications: 50+ in national and international indexed journals
- Research & Development Cell: Active R&D cell coordinating research activities
- Institutional Innovation Council (IIC): MHRD-recognized innovation council
- MoUs: Collaborative research agreements with industry and academic institutions
- Incubation Center: Support for dental technology startups and innovation projects
- Ethical Committee: Institutional Ethical Committee for research oversight

## Student Life & Campus

- Campus Size: Multi-acre campus on NH-544 (Salem-Coimbatore Highway)
- Hostel: Separate boys and girls hostels with modern amenities
- Transport: Fleet of buses covering Salem, Erode, Namakkal, Tiruchengode, and surrounding areas
- Sports: Cricket, volleyball, basketball, badminton, and other facilities
- Cultural Activities: Annual cultural fest, inter-college competitions
- Digital Classrooms: Smart classrooms with audio-visual learning aids
- Wi-Fi Campus: Full campus wireless internet connectivity
- Library: Well-stocked library with national and international journal subscriptions

- Fee Structure: https://dental.jkkn.ac.in/fees-structure/
- NAAC: https://dental.jkkn.ac.in/accreditation/naac/

- Gallery: https://dental.jkkn.ac.in/gallery/
- Blog: https://dental.jkkn.ac.in/blog/
- Best Dental College Tamil Nadu: https://dental.jkkn.ac.in/best-dental-college-tamil-nadu/
- AI Dental Campus: https://dental.jkkn.ac.in/ai-dental-campus/
